mapper.sql: bp.id, bp.created_time, bp.created_timestamp, bp.created_by, bp.created_id, bp.modified_time, bp.modified_timestamp, bp.modified_by, bp.modified_id, bp.deleted, bp.version, bp.remark, bp.status, bp.code, bp.name, bp.seq, bp.build_in_flag, bp.org_id, bp.department_id
mapper.select:
select
, 0 as checked from `position` bp inner join `org` bo on bp.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2
inner join `department` bd on bp.org_id = bd.org_id and bp.department_id = bd.id and bd.deleted = 0 and bd.status = 1
where bp.deleted = 0 and bp.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId}
and bp.department_id in
order by bp.name asc, bp.seq asc

select
, 1 as checked from `position` bp inner join `org` bo on bp.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2
inner join `department` bd on bp.org_id = bd.org_id and bp.department_id = bd.id and bd.deleted = 0 and bd.status = 1
inner join user_position bup on bp.id = bup.position_id and bup.deleted = 0 inner join `user` bu on bup.user_id = bu.id and bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 where bp.deleted = 0 and bp.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId}
and bp.department_id in
and bu.id = #{userId} order by bp.name asc, bp.seq asc

select
,
,
from `position` bp inner join department bd on bp.org_id = bd.org_id and bp.department_id = bd.id and bd.deleted = 0 and bd.status = 1 inner join `org` bo on bp.org_id = bo.id and bd.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 and bp.id = #{id}
